description: Register an MLflow resource for experiment tracking and model registry

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource.

tracking_uri.label: Tracking URI
tracking_uri.description: MLflow tracking server URI, e.g. 'http://localhost:5000' or 'databricks'

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MLflow server username

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MLflow server password
